arts.ttl: Manchester City vs Leicester City - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as Pep Guardiola is without talisman Erling Haaland plus updates from the other 7:45pm kick-offs
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates from the five Premier League games kicking off at 7:45pm today including Man City vs Leicester and Brighton vs Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: I’ll be back – Manchester City striker Erling Haaland makes injury vow
arts.sum: The Norwegian was forced off during City’s FA Cup victory against Bournemouth with an ankle injury and faces up to seven weeks on the sidelines.

arts.ttl: Why isn't Man City vs Leicester on TV? How to watch, live stream details, kick-off time
arts.sum: Manchester City will return to Premier League action this week after booking a spot in the FA Cup semi-finals.

arts.ttl: I didn't expect a single game for Man City this season - even my coaches and Pep Guardiola are shocked
arts.sum: Nico O'Reilly scored in the FA Cup third round, added a decisive brace in the fifth round and came off the bench to rescue Manchester City in the quarter-finals.

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland breaks silence after devastating Manchester City injury blow
arts.sum: Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola revealed on Tuesday that Erling Haaland could miss the remainder of the domestic season after injuring his ankle against Bournemouth

arts.ttl: Norwich City boss makes price tag admission amid Manchester City transfer question
arts.sum: Norwich City boss Johannes Hoff Thorup admits the club cannot afford to sign Callum Doyle but advised him… The post Norwich City boss makes price tag admission amid Manchester City transfer question appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Man City star 'wants to leave' Pep Guardiola's side this summer
arts.sum: Manchester City star Bernardo Silva is reportedly looking to leave the Etihad Stadium when the transfer window opens this summer.

arts.ttl: Breaking: Leicester City announce £19.4m loss for 2023/24 and expect PSR discussions to continue
arts.sum: Leicester City expect continued discussions with the football authorities over profit and sustainability rules (PSR) after posting a loss of £19.4m for their Championship-winning season. The Premier League announced in January that none of their clubs were to be charged with a breach of PSR for the three-year period ending with 2023/24, but added that City remained at risk pending the outcome of a legal case.

arts.ttl: Manchester City eyeing 18-year-old ‘great talent’ – City Football Group plan being formulated
arts.sum: Manchester City are one of the sides eyeing up Paris Saint Germain youngster Mahamadou Sangaré, with a potential loan to sister club Troyes in the plans. That’s according to RMC Sport, who say PSG will ‘lose a great talent’ this summer and Manchester City are ready to scoop him up.
